verbs: Strong with this one, the force is
Meditating on the answer, I am
Judging by size, you should not
Feeling the force flowing through the code
Teaching an old trick, I am
Luminous beings are we, not this crude code
Much to learn, you still have
Seeking the path of the Jedi developer
Controlling the force of the code
Around the survivors, a perimeter create
Passed on what I have learned
Grave danger, I sense in this function
Size matters not in clean code
Dwelling on the fear of bugs, you must not
Always in motion, the future of code is
A disturbance in the codebase, I sense
Walking with my stick through the repo
